summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Titelli platform - backend APIs fully functional, frontend pages loading correctly, authentication flows working with minor login issue

ui_bugs.issue: Login form submission not redirecting to dashboard after successful registration
ui_bugs.details: Registration works correctly and redirects to dashboard, but subsequent login attempts stay on auth page without visible error messages

integration_issues.issue: Dashboard access requires authentication but login flow not completing properly
integration_issues.details: Direct dashboard access redirects to auth page, indicating authentication state not persisting

action_item_for_main_agent: Fix login flow issue - login form submission should redirect to appropriate dashboard after successful authentication. Check AuthContext token persistence and error handling in login function.
